zh.lifeSummary: 當Simon Warde於1190年之前出生在英國越可爾時，他的父親Sir William de la Warde30歲，母親Wilmot Jolliffe25歲。他於1210年與Constance VESCI結婚。他於1228年住在英國越可爾吉文代爾 在 格亞特 吉文代爾。他去世於1262年在英國英格蘭越可爾利德斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Simon Warde于1190年之前出生在英国越可爾时，他的父亲Sir William de la Warde30岁，母亲Wilmot Jolliffe25岁。他于1210年与Constance VESCI结婚。他于1228年住在英国越可爾吉文代爾 在 格亞特 吉文代爾。他去世于1262年在英国英格兰越可爾利德斯。

nameMeanings.name: Warde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Cormac, Donal.

variants.name: Ward
meanings: English: occupational name for a watchman or guard, from Middle English ward ‘watchman, guard’ (Old English weard, used as both an agent noun and an abstract noun).
English: occupational name from Middle English warde ‘armed guard’ (Old English weard ‘watching, guarding’), with the same meaning as 1 above.

Irish: shortened form of McWard, an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac an Bhaird ‘son of the poet’. The surname occurs throughout Ireland, where three different branches of the family are known as professional poets.

nameMeanings.name: Simon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

variants.name: Simen
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Simon Warde was born before 1190, in Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir William de la Warde, was 30 and his mother, Wilmot Jolliffe, was 25. He married Constance VESCI in 1210. He lived in Givendale in Great Givendale, Yorkshire, England in 1228. He died in 1262, in Leeds, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Givendale in Great Givendale, Yorkshire,: Givendale in Great Givendale, Everwyck, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Simon Warde est né avant 1190, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir William de la Warde, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Wilmot Jolliffe, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Constance VESCI en 1210. Il a vécu à Givendale in Great Givendale, Everwyck, Angleterre en 1228. Il est décédé en 1262, à Leeds, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Givendale in Great Givendale, Yorkshire,: Givendale in Great Givendale, Yorkshire, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Simon Warde vor 1190 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William de la Warde 30 und seine Mutter Wilmot Jolliffe 25. Er hat 1210 Constance VESCI geheiratet. 1228 hat er in Givendale in Great Givendale, Yorkshire, England gelebt. Er starb 1262 in Leeds, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Simon Warde è nato il prima del 1190 nel Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir William de la Warde, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Wilmot Jolliffe, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Constance VESCI nel 1210. Vissuto a Givendale in Great Givendale, Yorkshire, England nel 1228. Morì nel 1262, nel Leeds, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Simon Wardeが1190年以前にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir William de la Wardeは30歳，母Wilmot Jolliffeは25歳であった。1210年にConstance VESCIと結婚した。彼は1228年にはイギリスヨークシュアイアギベンダル イン グレアト ギベンダルに住んでいた。彼は1262年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアリーズで死去した。

ko.Givendale in Great Givendale, Yorkshire,: 영국 요르크실르 지븐데일 인 그리트 지븐데일
ko.lifeSummary: Simon Warde(이)가 1190년 이전 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William de la Warde(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Wilmot Jolliffe(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1210년 Constance VESCI(와)과 결혼했다. 1228년도에 영국 요르크실르 지븐데일 인 그리트 지븐데일에서 살았다. 그는 1262년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 리드즈에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Simon Warde nasceu antes 1190, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William de la Warde, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Wilmot Jolliffe, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Constance VESCI em 1210. Ele viveu em Givendale in Great Givendale, Yorkshire, Inglaterra em 1228. Ele faleceu em 1262, em Leeds, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Givendale in Great Givendale, Yorkshire,: гивендеил ин грит гивендеил, еркшир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Simon Warde родился перед 1190 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William de la Warde было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Wilmot Jolliffe, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Constance VESCI в 1210 г. Он жил в местности гивендеил ин грит гивендеил, еркшир, Англия в 1228 году. Он умер в 1262 г. в местности лидс, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
